packages.title: Paper Lab Field Report - IG Reels
packages.hook: The paper lab has a fresh field report.
packages.script15Second: The paper lab has a fresh field report. MarketOps is a paper-trading simulation lab. Latest sample run: 8 signals reviewed, 0 approved, 8 blocked. Fake money only. Not financial advice.
packages.script30Second: The paper lab has a fresh field report. This MarketOps package turns a paper run into a reviewable story: sample vehicles scanned, Risk Desk decisions recorded, fake paper activity summarized, and every output held for human review. The useful part is the operating discipline, not any real-money claim. Paper-trading simulation and fake/sample money only. In development. Not financial advice. No live execution.
packages.script60Second: The paper lab has a fresh field report. MarketOps is being built as a local-first paper-trading operations lab. The latest sample-data loop shows 8 vehicles scanned, 8 signals reviewed, 0 approved by Risk Desk, 8 blocked, and 0 fake paper events. The paper P/L was $0.00, with a paper return of 0.00% and max paper drawdown of 0.00%. This is not real performance. The point is to show the workflow: scan, review, fake execution, reporting, compliance, and human approval before anything public-facing. Paper-trading simulation and fake/sample money only. In development. Not financial advice. No live execution.
packages.caption: A transparent update from the fake-money MarketOps lab MarketOps is a paper-trading simulation and build-in-public lab. Fake/sample money only. Not financial advice.
